border_color_all="#ffffff"][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What does an FAQ Page contain?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" border_color_all="#000000"]A Frequently Asked Question (FAQ) page contains a list of questions and answers for a particular topic.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What is an FAQPage Schema?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default"]A properly marked-up page that appears in the search results as a rich snippet.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Are every page is eligible for FAQPage Schema?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default"]

No, only properly marked up FAQ pages may be eligible to have a rich result on the Search such as Google, Bing, and Yahoo.

[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question=" How does FAQPage Schema help a website?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default"]A properly makeup page with FAQPage Schema appears in the search result as a rich snippet. Thus, increases the number of chances for users to interact with it.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Does Divi Plus FAQPage Schema module create marked up FAQs?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default"]Yes, with the Divi Plus FAQPage Schema module, you can create a properly marked up FAQ page that would appear in the search result as a rich snippet. Moreover, you'll get multiple options to make the FAQ page look engaging and beautiful.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What are the features of the FAQPage Schema module?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default"]

There are multiple features in the FAQPage Schema module, some of are as follows,

  • Accordion & Grid FAQPage Schema Layout.
  • Display FAQs in up to 4 columns.
  • Showcase FAQs in the masonry style.
  • And many more.
[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][/dipl_faq_page_schema][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
